text: The registration period for any vehicle registered pursuant to this article shall take effect and expire on dates determined by the commissioner after consultation with appropriate representatives of the commercial trucking industry in New York state.

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 14
##### § 405-D — Registration period

The registration period for any vehicle registered pursuant to this article shall take effect and expire on dates determined by the commissioner after consultation with appropriate representatives of the commercial trucking industry in New York state.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
